title: Capability Buildprint Author
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: An internet-deepsearch authoring Buildprint that turns a capability idea, existing integration, vendor docs, or source repo into a valid phased Capability Buildprint packet.
promise: When context is thin, forces agents to search current internet/docs/source evidence, compare candidate techniques, and choose the best current approach before authoring or asking broad questions.
risks: Authored packets still need dogfooding against real host repos
Vendor-specific implementation quality depends on current source evidence, docs, and benchmark availability
Proof claims must remain conservative until a capability is applied
checks: Internet deepsearch selects or downgrades the technique before authoring
Capability is bounded to one reusable promise
Best-practice/current/proven claims are cited or downgraded
Verification and receipt rules are concrete

publicStatus.label: Draft authoring workflow
publicStatus.explanation: Ready to create the first real capability packet, likely Stripe subscriptions or RBAC.
